# What kind of contribution?

- [ ] Experience / client reference for an existing entry (any approval merges)
- [ ] New technology (starts in Assess; layer owner reviews)
- [ ] Ring change (`ring` updated **and** appended to `ring_history`; layer owner reviews)
- [ ] Blueprint / docs / tooling

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. For ring changes: the evidence (project, production use, failure mode). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 scripts/validate.py` passes locally (or I trust CI)
- [ ] For new entries: based on `templates/entry-template.md`, champions set
